entry.title: PS validation settlement rule before release project
entry.content:
Hello, we are searching for a solution regarding settlement rules in PS.

We want to validate if there is maintained a settlementrule in al WBS element before the project is released.

We have S4HANA ON PREMISE 2020 02 (05/2021) FP.

 

Regrads

 

Sebastian

entry.title: Transaction code KALC is not appearing in zeros
entry.content:
Hi, when I execute t-code KALC I am finding some document number that are not been cleared, for that reason the amount in my account is not zero, It works correctly some month ago....

I checked and all the FICO reconciliation ledger configuration is correct.

KALA- activate recon ledger

OBYN - Clearing account

Transaction GA0 and CO1 configured

OKKP- Has reconc ledger active

Do you have any idea why could be this difference?

entry.title: Concept of distribute difference and charges of difference in F-28 and F-53 in sap
entry.content:
Hi Gurus and Experts 

Can someone let  me know what is concept of distribure difference and charges of difference in F-53 and F-28.

Please advise.

Regards,

Aman Jain 

FIN (Finance) SAP S/4HANA Finance FIN General Ledger FIN Asset Accounting FIN General Ledger #@Lakshmipathi 

@Bohdan @sanilbhandari @iklovski @Paulo_Vitoriano @Neeraj_Jain @RAHEEL_BABAR @sumesh_gupta

entry.title: Display G/L balances in FS10N transaction based on company code fiscal year period
entry.content:
Hello All, 

we have display the G\L Balances as per the Company code fiscal year period  Ex: India (April- March) instead of January to December, can someone help where we can do configuration changes so that we can display the balances as per fiscal year .

Below screen shot balances are displayed from January to December cycle

 

 

Thanks in Advance

sree

entry.title: Partner profit center xxxx is locked for 2024/06/19
entry.content: When doing GR, purchasing found this system error Partner profit center xxxx is locked for 2024/06/19

entry.content:

How to remove watermark "TEST COPY" and enable footer for Monthly Invoice PDF form?

entry.title: SAP BOFC Report Modification
entry.content:
we're encountering with the SAP BOFC report. Recently, we made modifications to include new nature of accounts. These changes were successfully implemented. However, after assigning the task to a specific region, we noticed that these new accounts are not reflecting in the report when we attempt to run it.

It seems that there might be a configuration or setting that needs adjustment to ensure the new accounts are properly integrated into the report output. Could someone please advise on the necessary steps or settings that may be missing in this process?

Your prompt assistance in resolving this matter would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Effects Activating Segment reporting for assets
entry.content:
hi,

what are the effects of Activating Segment reporting for assets. It's not totally clear what the consequences are on the current set up.

kr

NIco

entry.title: Reference Document is B in KE24
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

I have executed KE24 transaction code. Reference document no is displayed and Record type is B.

Please suggest, what transaction codes should i use to displayed the reference document.

Regards

Sridhar

entry.title: Production system readonly
entry.content:
Hello Team

We are planning to migrate to s4/hana, so after migration some users might need to have access to the productive system to check historical data. So is there any possibility to start the database in read-only mode or how can we restrict users to make any changes in the system, they just need to view the data, how can we achieve this, please suggest on this.

 

Regards

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Credit Control Block is displaying as B
entry.content:
Dear Friends

I am working in ECC 6.0.

In Transaction code VKM3, the Sales documents in column Customer review date is displaying as B.

Sales Order does not show any block in VA03 in Billing document tab.

In Transaction code OVA8, Credit Control is static and A. Next review date and open items is A.

Max.open.item% is 1 and No of days open is 1.

Please let me know, why the system is displaying B and what should I check and to prevent it in the future?


Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: Audit question - Moving Average Unit Cost - How to see more decimals?
entry.content:
I know that Moving Average cost has more than two decimal places.  You can tell by doing the calculation, but I need to know where to view the additional decimal places.  Can you help?

Tcode MM03 shows Moving average cost at 2 decimals
Table MBEW shows Moving average cost at 2 decimals.
Total Inventory value is shown at 2 decimals.
But Moving average is actually at least 4 decimals
Where can I see the decimals? Is there a table?
Inventory total for a part is 10,093.03
There are 329 on hand.
MAUC is displayed as 30.68
but 30.68 * 329 = 10,093.72
NOT 10,093.03
Auditors don't like the difference ! Not one bit!
Somewhere, MAUC must be displayed with the actual decimals...? 30.6779027
I need to either show Auditors the 4 place decimals, or explain why that is not the case.
THANK YOU !

entry.title: Tax juridication US
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

It was my understanding that SAP was supposed to manage all tax related activities (set up rate, juridiction and so on).

We activated US on our SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Finance  tenant and started to setup a US company.

However, the only tax juridiction we have on the dev tenant is "7700000000 : Non-Taxable" while the starter tenant has the different region (Alabama, Alaska...).

Are we supposed to fill them ? 

thanks,

Best

entry.title: Automation of Invoice collection in one AP Mailbox
entry.content:
Current situation/Requirement: we have a manual process to collect email invoices in one AP mailbox and move them to Sharepoint. This is not sufficient and causes lots of delays and even lost invoices. Is there a better way of invoice collection with possibly OCR ?

Would SAP Concur cover this ? Or Kofax ?

Thanks David

entry.title: Assessment Cycle
entry.content:
Hello Experts

Can anyone tell me please how to solve this?

when i execute assessment cycle from KSU5 to allocate the cost from cost object to another in S4hana,

a CO document gets created and also an FI document gets created due to real time reconciliation of CO and FI.

my question is I want to substitute the assessment cost element in FI document with other GL accounts based on the sender and the receiver CO object, how can I achieve that in S4hana.

I created a substation rule under FI line items, and it didn't work, I also created one under CO line, but it didn't work.  

kindly assist

entry.title: Document 1010 5215268124 is not a purely a clearing document.
entry.content:
Dear Freinds,

The user is getting the following error.

Document 1010 5215268124 is not a purely a clearing document.
Message: - FS601.

Diagnosis

Payment doccument 72151681 in comapny code 1010 also contains the clearing document 2611243472 in addition to it sown clearing document in theline item 002. As a result, the document cannot be reversed after resetting  the cleared items.

System response

The payment cannot be reset.

Procedure

Check the data entered and correct your entry , if necessary.

If the payment for document 1010 5215268124 is really to be reset, the cleared items 2611243472 have to reset prior to this.

Please suggest, how to resolve the issue.

Regards

Sridhar

entry.title: Substation in CO-FI Reconciliation Document
entry.content:
Hello Experts.

In the assessment cycle we have an FI document that gets generated that has the assessment cost element to be debited and credited from the cost center to the group of WBSs.

we have a requirement to create a substation rule to substitute the assessment cost element in the debit side and credit side with other GL accounts.

I have created a rule under FI line items in GGB1 using a user exit based on a Ztable that map each WBS and Cost center to the right GL and it worked on ECC but the same one doesn't work on S4hana can you please assist?

entry.title: How to restore missing tabs when creating BoE collection?
entry.content:
Some tabs are missing when creating BoE collection in the app Create BoE for Collection - China.
